content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s single-stream iterative self-improvement framework to integrate multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine pipeline that retains the original’s core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data while boosting refinement quality beyond what single-perspective feedback can achieve. This hybrid framework would leverage inherent disagreement between the LLM’s own divergent problem-solving perspectives to catch more errors and gaps in initial outputs, rather than relying on incremental adjustments from a single frame of reference.
